headline: Tesla posts record quarterly deliveries but cuts vehicle prices again as battery input costs rebound and European subsidy rules tighten

Saudi-led supply cuts lift crude benchmarks, but Asian refinery margins narrow as end-demand for diesel weakens
Pfizer beats quarterly profit estimates on cost controls, yet US drug-pricing negotiations widen to additional therapies next year
Airbus raises annual delivery guidance as engine shortages ease, though a stronger euro trims export competitiveness against US rivals

US office landlords gain on expectations of lower policy rates, while regional banks signal stricter refinancing terms for maturing debt
BHP says copper output rose on higher ore grades, but labor talks in Chile raise risk of temporary disruptions
US utilities rally on falling Treasury yields, yet wildfire liability reforms stall in a key state legislature
European telecom operators secure spectrum renewals at lower upfront fees, but wholesale price caps squeeze long-term return assumptions
US core inflation cools unexpectedly and Treasury yields drop, while services wage growth remains above levels consistent with target inflation
A major sovereign wealth fund increases allocations to private credit despite rising default warnings from rating agencies
Microsoft signs new government cloud contracts, but antitrust authorities in Europe open a fresh probe into bundling practices

European natural gas inventories remain high after mild weather, but LNG shipping disruptions in a key canal raise winter supply concerns
Novo Nordisk reports stronger obesity drug demand, while health insurers push for tighter reimbursement criteria in multiple markets

Luxury goods sales beat expectations in the US, though demand in China softens as currency volatility erodes tourist spending
